guardrail.label: Guardrail
guardrail.body_html: You are rating the role — its tasks, competency weights, trait targets for the role context, and context factors. You are not rating each other. Peer rating of any named person's personality is blocked at the schema level (SCIENCE-SPEC §7; PHASE0-SPEC §2.7). Team composition signals are derived only from each member's own validated profile, never from anyone else's opinion about them.
stub_banner.label: Sample template
stub_banner.body_html: This is a research-derived SAMPLE Role Profile shipped for the demo. Trait bands, competency weights, BARS anchors, and cognitive complexity must be validated per-organization by the engaged I/O psychologist before any live decision. validity_status remains dev_stub on each affected row; a row cannot transition to validated until a signed-off methodology produces real values.
hitl.label: Human in the loop
hitl.body: Fit scores INFORM a human hiring decision and never auto-decide. Every consequential action is logged with attribution per GDPR Art. 22 + EU AI Act Art. 14.
seal.body_clean_html: All {count} evaluators submitted independently before Stage 2 closed. No pre-reveal reads were attempted — the audit log is clean. Submissions are now immutable. Per Linstone & Turoff (1975) Delphi method.
seal.body_unclean_html: All {count} evaluators submitted independently before Stage 2 closed. {attempts} read-during-seal attempt(s) logged (audit_log.action='team_def.read_during_seal') — review before sign-off. Submissions are now immutable. Per Linstone & Turoff (1975) Delphi method.
locale_switcher.label: Language
